artifacts.summary: Root-cause analysis of the count-with-tolerance freshness proxy in census.nix:40-68, live-verified evidence of a real flag-rename (U=5202) and phantom index entries (U=5206, U=5209) hiding inside a divergence=0 false-green, survey of the existing tasks-823/824/827 staleness contract, five ranked technical approaches, and a concrete recommendation: an INBOX-scoped, UID-joined literal-filename set-diff producing renamed=/removed=/added= fields appended (backward-compatibly) to the existing freshness line, with the verdict flipping STALE if either the old count-tolerance check or the new exact-set check fires.

next_steps: Run /plan 108 to create an implementation plan for the census.nix freshness-line enhancement (and, as a related follow-up noted in Risks, plan for updating skill-email-cleanup SKILL.md's Stage 1 parser to act on the new renamed=/removed=/added= fields).
